song.title: Strong Tower
song.author: Newsboys
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C B C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .D G D G D G A . D G D Strong and mighty, strong to save us . G D G A Like a Fortress, never failing . D G D Strong in battle, strong in kindness .G D G A When we stray, Lord, You’re strong to find us|| . Bm When the winds come hard against us . D You are steadfast, You are true . Bm When the ground beneath us trembles . A Your foundation never moves
[C] . D G Strong Tower, high and glorious . D A Strong Tower, mighty in love . D G Our Refuge, our Defender . D A D Strong Tower, Lord above
[V2] Strong to lead us through the shadows Strong to carry all our sorrows|| When the enemy surrounds us Closing in as darkness falls Though his armies rage against us They can never scale these walls .. .. .. .. --- [B] . D Bm A You are my shelter, my shield . D G A You are the home |I could never deserve . G D A Here I will serve, ever under Your gaze . G D A Here I will serve, ever singing Your praise
